name: NymCard
description: MENA card-issuing and embedded finance platform API for banks, fintechs, and corporates.

seo.title: NymCard — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: NymCard: MENA card-issuing and embedded finance platform API for banks, fintechs, and corporates.

when_to_use: Issuing virtual Visa/Mastercard cards for MENA fintechs
Launching prepaid corporate card programs in the GCC
Embedding card-issuing APIs for UAE neobank products
Enabling spend controls on employee cards via API

pros: Modern API design versus regional peers
review.verdict: MENA's most modern card issuing and embedded finance platform — credible regional Marqeta alternative.
review.best_for: MENA banks, fintechs, and corporates launching card programs
review.not_for: Teams needing global issuing or outside the Gulf region
